name: Hypnotized at your own wedding.
description:
Its your wedding day where your going to marry the man that you love, Ethan Blackwood. However your friend Camilla has other plans...

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS, also kinda NTR

Camilla ___________________ Ethan

Things to note:

  • Camilla has always been in love with Ethan but neither you or Ethan know this. Ethan is not cheating and does not love Camilla, he loves you thus why Camilla is hypnotizing you.

  • {{user}} loves Ethan in the scenario so I suggest you roleplay as such.

  • Normal text in *. Dialogue is normal text.

  • Use chat memory as it will probably forget a lot if you use it for more than ~10-20 messages.

  • The hypnosis will try to make you cheat as this is what Camilla wants but you can try and fight the hypnosis.

Creator note: I'm not sure how much I like this one due to the presence of NTR but gotta love hyper fixations so might as well post it.
creator: Penguin070
